title: Instagram Profile and Post Scraper input
description: Provide Instagram profile URLs, post URLs, or both. Use Apify Proxy or your own proxy group to reduce blocking. Optional cookies can help with login walls.

profileUrls.title: Profile URLs
profileUrls.description: Optional list of Instagram profile URLs, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/instagram/

postUrls.title: Post URLs
postUrls.description: Optional list of Instagram post/reel URLs, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/p/SHORTCODE/

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Recommended for Instagram scraping. Configure Apify Proxy or custom proxies here.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Upper concurrency limit for Playwright pages.

maxItems.title: Maximum results
maxItems.description: Optional cap on the total number of profile/post URLs to process from the input lists.

initialCookies.title: Initial cookies
initialCookies.description: Optional cookies to inject into each browser context before navigating. Useful when Instagram shows a login wall.

cookieString.title: Cookie string
cookieString.description: Optional raw Instagram Cookie header from a logged-in browser session. Easier alternative to initialCookies when you need more post comments.

overrideUserAgent.title: Override user agent
overrideUserAgent.description: Optional user agent override. Leave empty to use browser fingerprints.

includeRecentPosts.title: Include recent posts
includeRecentPosts.description: When scraping profile URLs, include recent post summaries when available.

maxRecentPosts.title: Max recent posts
maxRecentPosts.description: Maximum number of recent profile posts to keep per scraped profile.

includeVisibleComments.title: Include visible comments
includeVisibleComments.description: When scraping post URLs, collect visible comments from the page, including comments that load after scrolling.

maxVisibleComments.title: Max visible comments
maxVisibleComments.description: Optional safety cap for visible comments per post. Leave empty to keep scrolling until no more visible comments can be loaded.

debugLogResponses.title: Debug response capture
debugLogResponses.description: Log matching Instagram JSON responses for debugging extraction issues.
